hypothesis: If large language models are prompted with domain-specific in-context examples of increasing complexity using a structured PROV-DM schema, then more capable reasoning models (such as o4-mini) with one-shot prompting will achieve higher precision, recall, and F1-scores for extracting material synthesis provenance graphs from scientific literature compared to smaller or zero-shot configurations, because richer contextual guidance reduces ambiguity in mapping synthesis narratives to formal graph structures.
